雅各.appearanceEn: A young infant with a slight build, swaddled in simple linen cloth. His hair is fine and dark, still developing. His features are soft and rounded, indicative of a newborn.

periods.appearanceEn: A middle-aged man around 40 years old, with a well-groomed beard and hair that is dark with hints of gray. He wears a long tunic with a mantle over it, made from wool, and has a confident but weary expression. He carries a staff and appears more robust and rugged from years of hard work.

An older man, around 90 years old, with a full gray beard and thinning hair. His clothing is more ornate, with intricate patterns in a richly colored fabric, indicating his status. His face is lined and wise, projecting an air of dignity and experience. He walks with a staff, supported by a slight stoop.

亚伯拉罕.appearanceEn: An elderly man, around 75 years old, with graying hair and a full beard. He wears simple, loose-fitting robes made of undyed wool, cinched at the waist with a leather belt. His build is sturdy, reflecting years of life in a nomadic lifestyle. He carries a walking stick, symbolizing his journey.

periods.appearanceEn: An older man, now about 100 years old, with more wisps of white in his hair and beard. He wears slightly more ornate robes, reflecting his status as a patriarch, with intricate patterns. His build remains solid, indicating a life of physical activity, and he has a more regal demeanor as he stands with his wife Sarah and son Isaac.

An aged patriarch, around 130 years old, with a long white beard and thin hair. He dons an even more dignified robe, with rich colors that symbolize his covenantal status. His posture is more frail, indicating old age, yet his eyes reflect wisdom and determination as he prepares for the sacrifice of Isaac.

以撒.appearanceEn: An infant swaddled in simple linen cloth, with tousled dark hair. Soft and chubby with a round face, reflecting the innocence of a newborn.

periods.appearanceEn: A young boy around 10 years old, with cropped dark hair and a lean build. He wears a tunic made of undyed wool, with bare feet. His expression shows a mix of curiosity and confusion as he carries wood for the altar.

A middle-aged man, around 40 years old, with a fuller beard and a more defined jawline. He wears a longer robe, indicative of his status, with a sash around his waist. His hair is slightly graying, and he has a calm, contemplative expression as he meets Rebekah.
